candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it appears to be a component of the already selected parent row 'Cost of revenues/COGS'. The selected COGS row equals the full COGS total and sits above component lines, so adding this separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of revenues/COGS', which appears to be the full total already inclusive of 'Depreciation/Amortization in COR/COGS'.

candidates.why: Although this is an explicit SG&A-related D&A line, it appears to reconcile into the selected parent row 'Selling Costs' together with the balancing/non-recurring lines, so it is already embedded in the selected XSGA bucket.
This appears to be a component of the selected 'Administrative Expenses' row rather than a separate same-level expense to add later.
This also looks like a component detail within selling costs, not a separate line outside the selected 'Selling Costs' bucket. Adding it separately would risk double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is clearly a component of the selected 'Research & Development Expense' row. Because 'Research & Development Expense' was already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, this R&D D&A should not be added separately.

variables.notes: All visible SG&A/R&D D&A rows appear to be embedded within the selected parent rows 'Selling Costs', 'Administrative Expenses', and 'Research & Development Expense'. The R&D D&A row should especially not be added separately because the parent R&D row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
